name: Sweet'n' Sour Squash Medley
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Pattypan Squash, sliced horizontally and into wedges
1/4 lb Green Beans, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 small Yellow Squash, halved lengthwise and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine brown sugar, mustard seeds, cinnamon, cloves, vinegar, and lemon slices in a medium nonaluminum saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and simmer an additional 2 minutes.
4. Remove from heat; cover and let cool to room temperature.
5. Remove whole spices and lemon; drain.
6. Serve immediately or store in an airtight container in the refrigerator. (Fat 0.1, Cholesterol O.)
